commit.message:
fix: remove DOMContentLoaded wrappers for Astro module scripts

Astro bundles <script> tags as deferred ES modules. By the time they
execute, DOMContentLoaded has already fired, so callbacks never ran.
Removed wrappers from Hero, About, Experience, Projects, Contact,
and index page starField init.

commit.message:
feat: integrate Mailjet webhook events for newsletter delivery tracking

Add Mailjet Event API webhook handler following the same pattern as
existing Mailgun/Resend/Unosend webhook integrations:

- newsletterMailjetWebhookCore.js: Handles sent, open, click, bounce,
  blocked, spam, and unsub events. Maps them to normalized types and
  persists to Firestore (subscriber status, campaign_deliveries, events).
- Cloud Function endpoint (europe-west6, 256MiB, 60s timeout)
- Security via shared secret token in URL query parameter
- Supports Mailjet's batched event array format
- Extracts campaign ID from CustomID (set by email-cascade), with
  fallback to customcampaign and mj_campaign_id
- 17 unit tests covering all event types, secret validation, batch
  processing, edge cases

Mailjet webhook URL to configure in Mailjet dashboard:
https://{region}-{project}.cloudfunctions.net/newsletterMailjetWebhook?secret={MAILJET_WEBHOOK_SECRET}

fix: add overflow-hidden to row wrapper to fix WebKit nav clipping

On iOS Safari PWA (WebKit), the row wrapper containing the main
content area would expand beyond its flex bounds when the Dashboard
view rendered with overflow-y-auto, pushing the mobile bottom nav
bar below the viewport. Adding overflow-hidden to the row wrapper
forces WebKit to properly constrain the flex layout, keeping the
nav visible. The Tasks tab wasn't affected because PullToRefresh
uses absolute positioning which avoids the WebKit flex overflow bug.

commit.message:
feat: PR review gate — enforce conversation resolution before merge (#77)

feat: PR review gate — enforce conversation resolution before merge

Adds a 2-layer enforcement system for review comment resolution:

Layer 1: GitHub Ruleset 'Protect main' — server-side enforcement with
required_review_thread_resolution, required CI checks (quality, unit-test,
build), and current_user_can_bypass: never.

Layer 2: Copilot CLI preToolUse hook — advisory block on 'gh pr merge'
commands, checking for unresolved threads via GraphQL.

Also includes merge-guard.sh CLI tool and Makefile targets (make review-check,

commit.message:
Python:  Add Cosmos DB NoSQL Checkpoint Storage for Python Workflows (#4916)

* Add CosmosCheckpointStorage for Python workflow checkpointing

Add native Cosmos DB NoSQL support for workflow checkpoint storage in the
Python agent-framework-azure-cosmos package, achieving parity with the
existing .NET CosmosCheckpointStore.

New files:
- _checkpoint_storage.py: CosmosCheckpointStorage implementing the
  CheckpointStorage protocol with 6 methods (save, load, list_checkpoints,
  delete, get_latest, list_checkpoint_ids)
- test_cosmos_checkpoint_storage.py: Unit and integration tests
- workflow_checkpointing.py: Sample demonstrating Cosmos DB-backed
  workflow checkpoint/resume

Auth support:
- Managed identity / RBAC via Azure credential objects
  (DefaultAzureCredential, ManagedIdentityCredential, etc.)
- Key-based auth via account key string or AZURE_COSMOS_KEY env var
- Pre-created CosmosClient or ContainerProxy

Key design decisions:
- Partition key: /workflow_name for efficient per-workflow queries
- Serialization: Reuses encode/decode_checkpoint_value for full Python
  object fidelity (hybrid JSON + pickle approach)
- Container auto-creation via create_container_if_not_exists
